description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold, modern design with a predominantly matte black exterior accented by vibrant neon green elements. The shoe has a thick, sculpted sole with deep grooves and a slightly exaggerated profile, suggesting enhanced cushioning and support. Green highlights are present on the side panel, heel tab, laces, and tongue, creating a striking contrast against the black base. The upper appears to be constructed from synthetic leather or rubberized material, with perforations on the toe box for breathability. The lacing system is traditional, with green laces threaded through black eyelets, and the collar is padded for ankle support. The overall build and finish suggest a durable, stylish shoe suitable for urban environments and streetwear fashion.
description: A high-top black sneaker with neon green accents, thick sculpted sole, and green laces, designed for urban style and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the neon green side accent, thick black sole, and padded high-top collar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the green laces, perforated toe box, and green tongue tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar green accent and sculpted sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the green heel tab and padded collar, with a star-shaped detail at the heel.
